subtasks.description: Extract company details (name, address, registration number, tax ID), primary contact information (name, email, phone), and banking details (account number, routing number, bank name, account holder name) from the vendor onboarding form in a single structured JSON output.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single-document extraction task with a well-defined schema (company details, contact info, banking details). The extraction is straightforward field mapping from a standard form with no cross-document comparison or inference required. A small-tier model is sufficient for this simple, explicit extraction task. One subtask is appropriate because all requested fields come from the same document and can be extracted in a single call with a unified schema."
